name: The Garden
oracleText:
({T}: Add {G}.)
{T}: Add {W}. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment spells or legendary spells.
Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "And the Lord God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it." — Genesis 2:15
notes: Early World major location card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for The Garden of Eden.
title: Place of First Breath
